message:
fix(tests): Fix compilation errors in lab_determinism and phase0_verification

- Add missing `Reactor` trait import to lab_determinism.rs to enable
  register() and poll() method calls on LabReactor
- Update phase0_verification.rs to use correct ObligationLeakOracle API:
  on_reserve() -> on_create(), on_abort() -> on_resolve()

All 21 phase0_verification tests now pass. 19/20 lab_determinism tests
pass (one pre-existing failure discovered: test_lab_different_seeds_
different_results - tracked in bd-3ivp).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
